[02:40:59] you're reversing the direction of cause

[08:25:20] as long as the floor is protected,
[08:25:22] nothing dies. Nothing falls apart.
[08:25:24] Nothing falls short. And you're free to

[08:26:09] your season of focus elsewhere. So
[08:26:12] something in motion stays in motion more
[08:26:14] easily than something at rest, right?
[08:26:16] That's just physics. And it applies to
[08:26:17] habits and life areas, too. So the floor
[08:26:19] isn't wasted effort during your focus
[08:26:22] seasons. It's actually what makes those
[08:26:23] focus seasons sustainable because you're
[08:26:26] not constantly having to restart things
